dictionary.label: Supplier legal name
dictionary.definition: The legal name of the supplier or vendor.

dictionary.label: Contract value
dictionary.definition: The total contract value disclosed in the supplier onboarding packet.

dictionary.label: Insurance coverage amount
dictionary.definition: The amount of general liability insurance coverage held by the supplier.

dictionary.label: Data processing agreement
dictionary.definition: Whether the supplier maintains a signed data processing agreement.

dictionary.label: Security certification
dictionary.definition: The supplier's disclosed information security certification.

dictionary.label: Delivery SLA days
dictionary.definition: The committed delivery service-level agreement measured in days.
